topic: Noah's Ark and the Great Flood

script.title: Noah's Ark and the Great Flood 🌈 | Bible Story for Kids

scenes.narration: Long ago, the world was filled with trouble, but one man named Noah loved God with all his heart. God had a very special plan just for him.
scenes.image_prompt: Colorful storybook illustration of a kind bearded man named Noah standing on a grassy hill at sunrise, looking up at a warm golden sky, cheerful family-friendly children's book style, bright vibrant colors

scenes.narration: God told Noah to build a giant boat called an ark. It would be bigger than anything Noah had ever seen before!
scenes.image_prompt: Cheerful children's storybook illustration of Noah with a hammer building a huge wooden ark in a sunny field, wood shavings flying, bright blue sky with fluffy clouds, colorful and family-friendly style

scenes.narration: Noah worked hard for many years. His family helped him hammer every board and seal every plank with care and love.
scenes.image_prompt: Warm storybook illustration of Noah and his family working together on the wooden ark, sons carrying planks, wife smiling, sunshine overhead, cheerful bright colors, family-friendly illustration

scenes.narration: Then God sent the animals, two by two! Elephants, lions, rabbits, and giraffes all marched peacefully into the ark together.
scenes.image_prompt: Joyful colorful children's illustration of animals walking two by two up a ramp into the ark — elephants, giraffes, lions, zebras, rabbits, smiling and peaceful, bright sunny sky, family-friendly storybook style

scenes.narration: The rain began to fall. For forty days and forty nights, the whole earth was covered in water while Noah's family stayed safe inside.
scenes.image_prompt: Gentle storybook illustration of the wooden ark floating on bright blue rolling waves during gentle rainfall, soft gray clouds, rainbow hint in the distance, cheerful not scary, children's book style

scenes.narration: Noah sent a little dove to find dry land. She flew back with an olive leaf in her beak, a sign that the water was going away!
scenes.image_prompt: Warm storybook illustration of a white dove with a green olive branch in its beak flying toward a wooden ark, Noah smiling at a small window, soft sunlight breaking through clouds, bright cheerful children's book style

scenes.narration: When the flood was finally over, Noah and his family stepped out onto dry land. The animals ran free and praised God with joy.
scenes.image_prompt: Joyful colorful illustration of Noah's family and animals coming out of the ark onto a green grassy mountain, birds flying, lions leaping, bright sunshine, vibrant cheerful children's storybook style

scenes.narration: Then God painted a beautiful rainbow in the sky — a promise of His love for you, for me, and for every family forever.
scenes.image_prompt: Stunning storybook illustration of a huge colorful rainbow arching over the wooden ark on a mountaintop, Noah's family looking up with wonder, animals gathered around, bright vibrant cheerful children's book style
